S.FORM: Trevor Booker hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1987, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 11, Trevor Booker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tre*or ő≤ooker ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, tre*or ő≤ooker, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
